component.name: KFtray
component.summary: A cross-platform system tray application for managing and sharing multiple kubectl port-forward commands

description.p: KFtray is a cross-platform system tray application designed for Kubernetes developers and DevOps engineers who need to manage multiple kubectl port-forward commands efficiently.

The application provides an intuitive interface for creating, managing, and sharing port-forwarding configurations across different Kubernetes contexts and namespaces. With KFtray, you can easily start, stop, and monitor multiple port-forward sessions from your system tray.

ul.li: System tray integration for quick access
Built with Tauri for native performance

screenshot.caption: Main KFtray interface showing active port-forward configurations
System tray menu with port-forward controls

description.p: Latest stable release with improvements and bug fixes
